purpose: Machine-readable source-family snapshot for Mansu reference curation. This file is evidence for freshness checks, not a substitute for reading source skill files.

families.evidence: uv tool upgrade ouroboros-ai; ouroboros --version; git -C /tmp/ouroboros-mansu-analysis rev-parse --short HEAD; find /tmp/ouroboros-mansu-analysis/skills -maxdepth 2 -name SKILL.md; find /Users/hansol/.codex/skills -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'ouroboros-*'
families.install_evidence: uv tool upgrade ouroboros-ai updated ouroboros-ai to 0.41.0 and executable /Users/hansol/.local/bin/ouroboros; ouroboros setup --runtime codex configured Codex, installed 20 Ouroboros Codex skills, registered MCP, and wrote /Users/hansol/.codex/rules/ouroboros.md.

families.evidence: git -C /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack pull --ff-only; cat /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack/VERSION; git -C /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack rev-parse --short HEAD; find /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack/.agents/skills -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'gstack-*'

families.priority_rule: For Codex runtimes, prefer LazyCodex / OMO Codex plugin as the highest-priority Oh My execution transport when codex plugin list reports omo@sisyphuslabs installed/enabled and hook/MCP entrypoints are healthy. Fall back to omx, then native Codex with Mansu slice discipline.
families.source_family_split: LazyCodex / OMO drives Codex execution. Mansu owns routing, evidence, checkpoints, and final ship/hold judgment. Ouroboros shapes early goals, Seed, Ledger, and long-horizon direction. gstack provides independent validation and specialist gates. Open Design creates design artifacts, and VoltAgent/awesome-design-md provides DESIGN.md reference grammar.
families.evidence: git -C /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/local/lazycodex pull --ff-only; git -C /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/local/lazycodex rev-parse --short HEAD; git -C /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/local/lazycodex submodule status --recursive; find /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/cache/sisyphuslabs/omo/0.1.0/skills -maxdepth 2 -name SKILL.md; /Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources/codex plugin list
families.install_update_warning: The local source checkout may be dirty and the installed cache contains node_modules. Do not use naive recursive copy/diff/update tooling. Preserve the marketplace name sisyphuslabs and the local config marketplace key indirection. Telemetry hooks may be disabled locally and should not be assumed active.

families.role: Core OmO harness source behind LazyCodex: discipline agents, parallel orchestration, model routing, skills, hooks, and lifecycle concepts. Treat LazyCodex as the Codex-facing thin distribution, not the full upstream truth.

families.source_path: runtime aggregated skill directory, not upstream source of truth
families.inventory_warning: Do not use aggregated runtime skills as upstream Oh My inventory. Exclude mansu-*, gstack-*, project-local skills, and unrelated curated skills before recording Oh My source drift.
families.source_discovery_rule: Prefer the adapter package/repo source or adapter-owned skill roots. Use omx --skills or ~/.codex/skills only as installed-runtime evidence with exclusions.

families.evidence: git clone https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills /tmp/agent-skills; git -C /tmp/agent-skills rev-parse --short HEAD; find /tmp/agent-skills/skills -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \;

git clone https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md /tmp/awesome-design-md; git -C /tmp/awesome-design-md rev-parse --short HEAD; find /tmp/awesome-design-md/design-md -name 'DESIGN.md' | wc -l; sed -n '1,220p' /tmp/awesome-design-md/README.md
families.inventory_note: Local file count under design-md is 74 at this snapshot. The README badge may show a different public collection count, so use the explicit find command as the checked evidence.

families.evidence: git clone https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design /tmp/open-design; git -C /tmp/open-design rev-parse --short HEAD; find /tmp/open-design/design-templates -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name SKILL.md | wc -l; find /tmp/open-design/design-systems -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d | wc -l; find /tmp/open-design -name SKILL.md | wc -l; sed -n '1,140p' /tmp/open-design/README.md
families.install_evidence: Current README presents Open Design 0.9.0 as a native app plus CLI/MCP route with `od mcp install <agent>` for Codex and other runtimes. Local setup/use still requires explicit approval before Mansu runs Open Design artifact workflows.
families.inventory_note: Open Design is treated as a callable design-artifact source route when installed or approved for install. Counts are volatile; 2026-06-08 local clone reports 111 design-template SKILL.md files, 151 design-system directories, and 477 total SKILL.md files; README advertises 100+ skills, 150 brand-grade DESIGN.md systems, and 261 plugins.
